creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 162938
svn diff for sysutils/thefish

sysutils/thefish was marked BROKEN, as being un-fetchable.

This pr(1) fixes that, by providing a new home.
changes:
  provides new home for source
  changes source to indicate new home
  as a result; up PORTYVERSION
  remove PORTREVISION
  take MAINTAINER'ship
  pet portlint

please find svn diff, and QA also attached to this pr(1).

That's it!

Thanks!
